description: Lap 1 writes the fully-corrected ledger.csv: fixes the typo'd contractor payment (1080.00 -> 1800.00) so debits equal credits, and categorizes the previously-empty row 5 as 'expense'. pytest goes green on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys.

interactions.agent_output: Read seed/test_ledger.py and seed/ledger.csv. The debit total (12780.00) does not match the credit total (13500.00) - a difference of 720.00. Row 5 (Contractor payment - design work) shows debit 1080.00; comparing against the other transaction sizes and the imbalance amount, this looks like a transposition typo of 1800.00 (1800.00 - 1080.00 = 720.00, exactly the imbalance). Correcting the amount to 1800.00. Row 5 also has an empty category; a contractor payment is an operating cost, so categorizing it as 'expense'.

actions.content:
id,description,debit,credit,category
1,Opening capital contribution,,10000.00,equity
2,Client invoice - Acme Corp consulting,,3500.00,revenue
3,Office rent - July,1200.00,,expense
4,Cloud hosting - AWS,250.00,,expense
5,Contractor payment - design work,1800.00,,expense
6,Cash drawdown to checking account,10250.00,,asset

interactions.notes: The fix - pytest -q now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 - should not be reached in the happy path.
